interactive.rationale: The page now has scenario controls and a PST request probe button that builds a Request with the selected privateToken operation.

references.rationale: The see-also section links to https://chromestatus.com/feature/5205548434456576, matching the feature.

design_system.rationale: Inline styles route through --bg/--text/--accent variables, no raw hex, and button overrides pair background + color correctly.

blurb_alignment.rationale: The concept's lede mirrors the feature index promise — same nouns, same scope.

spec_match.rationale: The controls cover issuance, redemption, and send-redemption-record while mapping each to the relevant PST Permissions Policy feature.

edge_cases.rationale: The page now surfaces pre-132 blocking, explicit allow, self-only lockdown, deny-all, unsupported document.featurePolicy, and Request rejection states.

summary: The page now clears the prior structural gap: it is interactive, probes the real Request privateToken API surface, and exposes policy and runtime failure modes.
